metadata.description: Find and fix security issues in vibecoded apps

plugins.name: penthera
plugins.description: Find and fix security issues in vibecoded apps. Scan a live URL or repo for TLS, headers, auth, secrets, IDOR/OAuth, and injection issues, then apply framework-aware fixes and re-scan to verify. Mapped to OWASP with SARIF output. Runs as a skill or CLI. Authorized testing only.
